evals.description: SaaS companies — verifies all classification dimensions populated
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
classifications array contains 3 entries — one per entity
Each classification has entity_name, url, industry_vertical, business_model, target_segment, pricing_model, value_proposition, claimed_differentiators, and confidence fields
confidence for each classification is one of 'high', 'medium', or 'low'
business_model is a descriptive string (not null) for entities with publicly visible pricing
pricing_model is one of 'subscription', 'usage_based', 'freemium', 'one_time', 'tiered', 'enterprise', or similar
segment_map object shows how the entities relate to each other in the market
Output contains no strategic recommendations — classifications are factual

evals.description: Local service businesses — verifies local B2C classification
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
industry_vertical for each is in the home services / trades category
business_model reflects local service (e.g., 'local service provider', 'B2C services')
target_segment reflects homeowners or local residential customers
